message:
test(resize): add 53 integration tests for scheduler, planner, and cross-module pipeline (wa-1u90p.7.1)

- 23 viewport_reflow_planner edge cases: degenerate inputs, boundary
  clamping, batch coverage invariants, scheduler class mapping, u32 overflow
- 22 resize_scheduler edge cases: zero normalization, multi-pane sequencing,
  rejection paths, gate state, aging credit, overload, storm detection
- 8 planner→scheduler integration tests: lifecycle, multi-pane budget,
  cold scrollback priority, phase transitions, intent coalescing, domains
- Fix broken single_flight test (adapt to new complete_active rejection)
- Fix crash.rs test compilation (WindyCrane's resize forensics parameter)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
